content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Today ( 05-05-2025) is Monday. In 96 days, what day will it be?

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

Find the remainder when 96 is divided by 7
96 % 7 = 5

Count 5 days forward from Monday, it will be Saturday.

So, 96 days after May 5th, 2025 (Monday) will be a Saturday.Also Check:➣ Test your knowledege- Quiz!

➣ Tricks to Solve Calendar Questions.
